query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.nickname, u.phone, u.email, u.roles,
       p.id as partner_id
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN partners p ON u.id = p.userId AND p.isActive = 1
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%cityPartner%' 
  AND u.isActive = 1
  AND u.id IN (15362146, 15372555, 16028821, 16800186, 16800523, 17370026)
ORDER BY u.id;
